results.requirement_text: The system shall prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page.

test_cases.title: Verify system enforces access control for user management page
test_cases.objective: Ensure users without administrator permission cannot open the user management page
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Exercise the configured action under a subject that lacks the stated permission.
steps.expected_result: Verify the system blocks the action according to the stated restriction.

test_cases.expected_result: System blocks access to the user management page for users without administrator permission.
assumptions: Exact entry point for user management page is not specified.

traceability.coverage_item: System enforces that users without administrator permission cannot open the user management page.

source_basis: prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page
